name: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Salmon & Trout Chunks inGravy 0.415kg
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Fully balanced all-natural wet cat food with salmon & trout protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats.
description: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Salmon & Trout Chunks in Gravy , fully balanced all-natural cat food with salmon & trout protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ....................... 7.5% Fat .......................... 4.5% Crude Ash.......................... 2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) .........0.3% Moisture .......................... 82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal by-products, cereals, fish and fish by-products (4% salmon, 4% trout), minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Taurine, Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E.
